description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a rectangular main structure and an attached single-story garage on one side. The house features a steeply pitched gable roof covered in brown shingles, with a central chimney rising from the main section. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored siding, and multiple windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, with the front facade displaying a prominent entryway. The entryway includes a small overhang and steps leading up to the front door, which is flanked by windows. The garage has a flat front with a large door, and the house sits on a flat, grassy plot. The overall design is simple and functional, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A two-story light-sided house with a gable roof, central chimney, attached garage, and symmetrical windows, set on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, the attached garage to the left, and symmetrical windows on both floors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the gable roof, and the side wall of the garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house and garage, with the roof and chimney visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's length, the gable roof, and the side of the entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small overhang, steps, and flanking windows
